description:
Enable / disable showing of HUD. Defines visibility of weapon crosshair and any informational tags that appear when pointing the weapon at an object as well as availability of the default action menu. Unfortunately, it also hides icons drawn with [[drawIcon3D]]. {{Feature|arma3| '''Since {{arma3}} v1.50''' there is a Description.ext's [[Description.ext#showHUD|showHUD[]]] array param that is identical in format to the extended [[showHUD]] command. When present, it will disable [[showHUD]] command entirely, allowing mission makers to permanently alter visibility of some HUD elements.
'''Since {{arma3}} v2.04''' it is possible to force drawing of [[drawIcon3D]] icons when HUD is hidden. The icons will also show when custom camera is [[camCreate|created]] and the view is switched to it via [[switchCamera]] or [[cameraEffect]] provided [[cameraEffectEnableHUD]] is enabled. For more information see [[drawIcon3D]]. }}
examples:
Hide vehicle radar and compass:
<sqf>
showHUD [
	true,  // scriptedHUD
	true,  // info
	false, // radar
	false, // compass
	true,  // direction
	true,  // menu
	true,  // group
	true,  // cursors
	true,  // panels
	true,  // kills
	true   // showIcon3D
];
</sqf>

Check if HUD visibility is hardcoded in mission config and [[showHUD]] command is overridden:
<sqf>private _disabledShowHUD = isArray (missionConfigFile >> "showHUD");</sqf>
name: showHUD

Item.desc: show scripted HUD such as weapon crosshair, action menu and overlays created with [[cutRsc]] and [[titleRsc]]. Same as [[showHUD]]'s first syntax
Item.name: scriptedHUD

Item.desc: show vehicle, soldier and weapon info
Item.name: info

Item.desc: show tank direction indicator. Not present in vanilla {{arma3}}
Item.name: direction

Item.desc: show group info bar (Squad leader info bar)
Item.name: group

Item.desc: show HUD weapon cursors (connected with scripted HUD)
Item.name: cursors

Item.desc: show icons drawn with [[drawIcon3D]] even when the HUD is hidden
Item.name: showIcon3D
